data.title: These Analysts Cut Their Forecasts On Bumble Following Q4 Earnings
data.description:
Bumble Inc. (NASDAQ:BMBL) posted mixed fourth-quarter results and issued a strong first-quarter revenue outlook on Wednesday.

Bumble reported quarterly losses of $4.06 per share, which missed the analyst consensus for earnings of 24 cents. Quarterly revenue came in at $224.17 million, which beat the Street consensus estimate of $221.3 million.

"In 2025, we made the deliberate choice to return Bumble to its women-first foundation, raising the bar on trust and authenticity while addressing pain points our members experience with online dating," said Whitney Wolfe Herd, CEO of Bumble.

Bumble expects first-quarter revenue in a range of $209 million to $213 million, versus the $210.89 million analyst estimate.

Bumble shares gained 34.3% to trade at $3.82 on Thursday.

These analysts made changes to their price targets on Bumble following earnings announcement.

Considering buying BMBL stock? Here’s what analysts think:

data.title: Why Are Opendoor Technologies Shares Sliding On Thursday?
data.description:
Opendoor Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:OPEN) shares are trading lower on Thursday amid the broader market downward pressure.

The Nasdaq is down 1.30% while the S&P 500 has shed 1.07%, and Real Estate is also slipping, setting a weak tape for the group.

Technical Analysis

OPEN is trading 0.3% above its 20-day simple moving average (SMA), but it's 21.8% below its 100-day SMA, showing short-term stabilization inside a still-damaged intermediate trend.

Shares are up 306% over the past 12 months, and at $4.96, they're positioned closer to the middle of the 52-week range than the extremes (between the $10.87 high and 51 cents low).

  • Key Resistance: $5.50
  • Key Support: $4.50

Timeline of Recent Bullish Sentiment

Short Interest and Market Headwinds

According to the latest reporting period, short interest in Opendoor fell slightly to 132.35 million shares. This represents 15.41% of the company's public float.

Traders currently face a days-to-cover metric of 2.55 days based on average daily volumes of 51.88 million shares.

Cautious Q1 Financial Outlook

Despite beating fourth-quarter revenue expectations with $736 million, management provided a cautious outlook for the current quarter. The company expects first-quarter revenue to decrease approximately 10% year-over-year.

OPEN Stock Price Activity: Opendoor shares were down 6.17% at $4.95 at the time of publication on Thursday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image via Shutterstock

data.title: IREN Shares Are Edging Lower Thursday: What's Going On?
data.description:
IREN Ltd (NASDAQ:IREN) shares are trading lower Thursday afternoon as broader market pressure tied to geopolitical tensions weighed on stocks, though investors are also continuing to digest the company's recently announced $6 billion at-the-market equity program. Here’s what investors need to know.

  • IREN stock is feeling bearish pressure. Why is IREN stock dropping?

Why IREN's $6 Billion Equity Program Is a Key Issue for Investors

Last week's debate around IREN's massive $6 billion at-the-market equity program remains important context for investors because it goes directly to the heart of the company's long-term investment case.

The filing expanded IREN's ATM capacity to $6 billion, replacing a prior $1 billion supplement, and the size of that authorization raised concern that future growth could come at the cost of meaningful shareholder dilution. The company had already sold more than 66 million shares for roughly $1 billion under the earlier program.

Bulls Say IREN's Microsoft Deal Highlights AI Growth Potential

That tension is why the news matters: for IREN, access to capital can accelerate its AI ambitions, but investors remain focused on whether that expansion will ultimately translate into attractive per-share returns.

IREN RSI Shows Neutral Momentum

IREN's Relative Strength Index (RSI) has mostly remained in the neutral range (30–70) over the past year, with several brief spikes into overbought territory above 70 during stronger rallies.

Recently, the RSI has cooled to the mid-40s range, suggesting the stock is neither overbought nor oversold and reflects more balanced momentum.

IREN Shares Slide Thursday

IREN Price Action: IREN shares were down 1.45% at $41.37 at the time of publication on Thursday, according to Benzinga Pro data.

Image: Shutterstock
